notes: Three search piles at the WGUR shack: the operator desk, the patch panel (cables and labels), the equipment rack (replacement parts).

the_log_binder.label: The engineer's log binder
the_log_binder.flavor: Black, three-ring. Entries since '98 in successive handwritings. Your handwriting takes over in '07. The page open right now is tonight's; the last entry is yours at 11 PM saying CARRIER NORMAL.

the_bakelite_microphone.label: The Bakelite mic
the_bakelite_microphone.flavor: Original. Heavier than the new RE-20 Rashid has been trying to replace it with. Has been keyed by every WGUR DJ since 1974.

the_february_master_tape.label: The February master tape
the_february_master_tape.flavor: Reel-to-reel. Your special: the four-hour ambient show you recorded the second week of February. The label on the reel-box, in your handwriting: 'EVA / FEB / DO NOT ERASE.'

the_yellow_patch_cable.label: Yellow patch cable
the_yellow_patch_cable.flavor: Standard quarter-inch. Six feet. You label your patches with electrical tape; this one's tape says 'EVA / BYPASS IN' in Sharpie.

the_blue_patch_cable.label: Blue patch cable
the_blue_patch_cable.flavor: Same length. Different colour because Rashid is colour-coded and the colour-coding has saved you twice. Tape says 'EVA / BYPASS OUT.'

the_label_tape.label: Electrical tape (label)
the_label_tape.flavor: Black 3M. The roll you've used to label every patch in the rack since '07.

a_vu_meter_card.label: Replacement VU meter card
a_vu_meter_card.flavor: Spare. Last replaced the rack-A meter in 2019. The drawer has three left.

a_spare_tube.label: Spare modulator tube
a_spare_tube.flavor: 12AX7. In the foam-padded box. The box has not been opened since 2017.

a_3a_fuse.label: 3A fuse
a_3a_fuse.flavor: Spare. The panel's fuses are 3A. The fuse will, when the patch panel pops, be the difference between a quick recovery and a slow one. Tonight you don't need it. Tomorrow you might.
